scripts.build:compose: bun run build.ts --outdir=api/public/static-spa && bun scripts/write-spa-htaccess.ts api/public/static-spa
scripts.env:wizard:compile: mkdir -p dist && bun build apps/env-wizard/src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/env-wizard
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/crypto lint:no-console-crypto && bun test --coverage
scripts.cypress:compose: bun run cypress:build-tasks && bash -lc 'set -a && [ -f docker/php/dev.env ] && . docker/php/dev.env; set +a && CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7123 cypress run'
scripts.cypress:compose:open: bun run cypress:build-tasks && bash -lc 'set -a && [ -f docker/php/dev.env ] && . docker/php/dev.env; set +a && CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7123 cypress open'
scripts.composer:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php install
scripts.openapi: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php openapi:generate
scripts.openapi:check: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php openapi:check
scripts.test:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php test
scripts.test:backend:coverage: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php test:coverage-bootstrap
scripts.analyse:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php analyse
scripts.ci:local: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run build:compose && bun run openapi:check && bun run test:backend:coverage && bun run analyse:backend
scripts.docs:capture: bun run cypress:build-tasks && bash -lc 'set -a && [ -f docker/php/dev.env ] && . docker/php/dev.env; set +a && CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7123 CYPRESS_DOC_MODE=1 cypress run --spec e2e/doc-screenshots.cy.ts' && bun scripts/sync-doc-screenshots.cli.ts
scripts.docs:check: bun scripts/check-doc-image-refs.cli.ts && nix develop -c mkdocs build --strict --config-file doc/customer/mkdocs.yml
